# kUSBPowerRequestWakeRelease

**Enumeration Case**

The system requests a release of power upon waking.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBPowerRequestWakeRelease = 2
```

## Discussion

When you use this enumeration with [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/iokit/iousbdeviceinterface942/2977171-returnextrapower], it  sends a message to all devices to return any extra wake power, if possible.
title: kUSBPowerRequestWakeRelease
